findings.evidence: `rg -n "lemma toBialgHom_id|lemma toBialgHom_comp|lemma ofHom_toBialgHom|lemma toBialgHom_ofHom|  rfl" code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/FiniteTypeCommHopfAlgCat.lean` shows lines 113-133 are the finite-type morphism API lemmas closed by `rfl` after the rebase to `_root_.CommHopfAlgCat`.
findings.fix: Replace these `rfl` proofs with explicit uses of `_root_.CommHopfAlgCat.hom_id`, `_root_.CommHopfAlgCat.hom_comp`, `_root_.CommHopfAlgCat.ofHom_hom`, and `_root_.CommHopfAlgCat.hom_ofHom`, using `ObjectProperty.hom_ext` or `ext` only where needed.
findings.issue: `toBialgHom_id`, `toBialgHom_comp`, `ofHom_toBialgHom`, and `toBialgHom_ofHom` are all proved by `rfl`, relying on the implementation details of `ObjectProperty.FullSubcategory` morphisms and Mathlib's `CommHopfAlgCat.Hom.hom`.

summary: The new proof surface mostly forwards to Mathlib cleanly, but the finite-type compatibility lemmas still prove morphism facts by raw definitional equality across the full-subcategory and Mathlib bundled-category wrappers.
